@astryx.pagination.label.description: Aria label for the pagination navigation region.

@astryx.pagination.previous.description: Aria label for the previous-page button.

@astryx.pagination.next.description: Aria label for the next-page button.

@astryx.pagination.goToPage.description: Aria label for an individual page-number button. `page` is 1-based.

@astryx.pagination.pageIndicators.description: Aria label for the dots-variant page-indicator group.

@astryx.pagination.count.description: Visible range-of-total text for the count variant. `from`/`to` are 1-based item indices.

@astryx.pagination.pageOfTotal.description: Page-x-of-y text. Used as the visible compact-variant text and as the screen-reader announcement when total is known.

@astryx.pagination.pageAnnounce.description: Screen-reader announcement when a page changes and total is unknown.
